IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE FOUNDATION IS THE PRIMARY FUNDRAISING ORGANIZATION TO STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE FOUNDATION WAS ORGANIZED FOR THE EXPRESS PURPOSE OF AIDING AND PROMOTING EDUCATIONAL AND CHARITABLE PURPOSES AND LAWFUL ACTIVITIES OF THE STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI.
IRS990.Desc: THE FOUNDATION RECEIVES GRANTS AND CONTRIBUTIONS THAT ARE USED TO MATCH GRANT FUNDS RECEIVED BY STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI AND ALSO TO SUPPORT OTHER DEPARTMENTAL NEEDS OF THE COLLEGE

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: THE FOUNDATION RECEIVES NONCASH DONATIONS IN THE FORM OF EQUIPMENT. THIS EQUIPMENT IS SUBSEQUENTLY CONTRIBUTED TO THE STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI TO ENHANCE THE TEACHING CAPABILITIES OF THE COLLEGE.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: THE FOUNDATION RECEIVES CONTRIBUTIONS THAT ARE TO BE AWARDED IN THE FORM OF SCHOLARSHIPS TO QUALIFIED STUDENTS ATTENDING THE STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ENDOWMENT FUNDS WERE ESTABLISHED TO PROVIDE FUTURE FUNDING TO STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI STUDENTS THROUGH SCHOLARSHIPS.

THE FOUNDATION IS EXEMPT FROM INCOME TAX UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE. IN ADDITION, THE FOUNDATION QUALIFIES FOR THE CHARITABLE CONTRIBUTION DEDUCTION UNDER SECTION 170(B)(1)(A)(IV) AND HAS BEEN CLASSIFIED AS AN ORGANIZATION OTHER THAN A PRIVATE FOUNDATION. THE FOUNDATION EVALUATES ITS UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS ON AN ANNUAL BASIS, AND THERE HAVE BEEN NO RECORDED UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS IN 2024, 2023, OR 2022. THEREFORE, NO PROVISION OR LIABILITY FOR INCOME TAXES HAS BEEN INCLUDED IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS. THE FOUNDATION FILES VARIOUS FEDERAL OR STATE NON-PROFIT TAX RETURNS. THE FOUNDATION IS NO LONGER SUBJECT TO U.S. FEDERAL OR STATE EXAMINATIONS BY TAX AUTHORITIES FOR TAX YEARS PRIOR TO 2020.

FOUNDATION GRANTS ARE TRACKED AND MONITORED CAREFULLY. THEY ARE ISOLATED IN THE FOUNDATION ACCOUNTING SYSTEM BY USING A UNIQUE CLASS/COST CENTER SO THAT INCOME AND ALLOWABLE EXPENSES ARE REPORTABLE. EXPENDITURES MUST FIRST BE DETERMINED TO BE ALLOWABLE UNDER THE GRANT GUIDELINES. PAYMENT OF EXPENSES IS THEN COMPLETED BY A CHECK REQUEST THAT IS SIGNED BY THE VICE-PRESIDENT OF EXTERNAL RELATIONS AND THE DEVELOPMENT AND ALUMNI RELATION COORDINATOR. THE TREASURER ENTERS THE EXPENSE IN THE FOUNDATION ACCOUNTING SYSTEM AND PRODUCES A CHECK. CHECKS CAN BE SIGNED BY THE PRESIDENT OF THE COLLEGE OR THE TREASURER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A PRELIMINARY DRAFT COPY OF THE FORM 990 IS PROVIDED TO THE BOARD PRIOR TO FILING OF THE FINAL RETURN.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE DOCUMENTS WILL BE PROVIDED UPON REQUEST RECEIVED BY JENNY JACOBS, TREASURER, ONE TECHNOLOGY DRIVE, LINN, MO 65051 OR BY EMAIL AT JENNY.JACOBS@STATETECHMO.EDU

THE COMPENSATION FROM RELATED ORGANIZATIONS DISCLOSED IN PART VII IS COMPENSATION PAID BY THE STATE TECHNICAL COLLEGE OF MISSOURI IN THE OFFICER OR DIRECTOR'S CAPACITY AS AN EMPLOYEE OF THE COLLEGE, NOT AS AN OFFICER OR DIRECTOR OF THE FOUNDATION.
